headline: Oracle adds Cleveland Clinic CEO to board of directors
summary: Dr. Tomislav Mihaljevic’s appointment comes months after Oracle named another healthcare leader, former Quest Diagnostics CEO Stephen Rusckowski, to the board as the technology giant expands its reach in the sector.

raw.headline: Oracle adds Cleveland Clinic CEO to board of directors

headline: Neonatal Ventilator Market Research Report 2026-2031: Increasing Adoption of NAVA, and Shift Towards Non-Invasive & Hybrid Ventilators
summary: The global neonatal ventilators market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.63% between 2025 and 2031. Key segments include consumables & accessories, non-invasive ventilators, standalone ventilators, and hospital end-users. North America leads the market, with the U.S. holding 87% by 2025. Industry highlights include GE HealthCare's acquisition of Intelerad and Philips’ strategic alliances to enhance clinical workflows.
